title: Create durable packets for AMP363 through AMP400
persona: AI platform, security, compliance, operations, sustainability, product, finance, people, safety, and executive reviewers
steps: Open representative AMP363-AMP400 workspaces from the generated Assistant subnav.
Review source signals, risk assessment, recommendations, artifact, approval route, and rollback plan.
expected: Each AMP363-AMP400 workspace persists an AssistantAdvancedProgramPacket row with a distinct ampNumber and programKey.
Each packet has a domain-specific nav label, title, artifact, approval owners, and no-mutation scope.
The shared advanced-program UI displays preview metrics, packet history, review notes, and queue-review controls.

AI runtime traces, prompts, tool grants, memories, knowledge assets, decision ledgers, exceptions, obligations, contracts, supplier/customer commitments, controls, audit evidence, regulatory response plans, geopolitical exposure, demand scenarios, commodity actions, sustainability records, product passports, investment gates, workforce plans, safety interventions, and physical-security actions are not mutated automatically.

title: Queue human review for AMP363 through AMP400 packets
steps: Create or select a DRAFT packet.
Add a review note describing the downstream decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED and records actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
AssistantActionQueueItem uses an AMP-specific actionKind such as assistant_amp363_review or assistant_amp400_review.
AssistantAuditEvent states that downstream records were not changed automatically.

title: AI governance, controls, resilience, sustainability, and workforce packets preserve no-silent-mutation guardrails
steps: Open a packet with active risk signals.
Inspect recommendationJson, approvalPlanJson, artifactJson, and rollbackPlanJson.
Queue review without executing downstream changes.
expected: recommendationJson requires review before AI runtime, prompt, memory, knowledge, decision, obligation, contract, control, regulatory, geopolitical, sustainability, product, investment, workforce, safety, or security execution.
approvalPlanJson names the responsible owner groups.
rollbackPlanJson preserves source records and requires a fresh packet when evidence changes materially.
Assistant recommendations remain review-only and cannot silently alter source systems, permissions, communications, filings, investment gates, people records, or physical-security response actions.
